name: scwap
description: Super Caveman with a Ponytail — process (Superpowers) + build restraint (Ponytail) + terse prose (Caveman), one install, three composable layers.

interface.shortDescription: Process + build restraint + terse prose, fused
interface.longDescription: Superpowers process discipline (plan/TDD/verify/review), Ponytail build restraint (YAGNI, smallest correct diff), and Caveman terse prose. Codex SessionStart hooks load all three layers from the plugin install; the Claude plugin adds live mode toggles + statusline.
defaultPrompt: Use scwap mode for this task.
